description.p: You rewind a creature's recent harm, drawing its body back toward the moment before its injuries were sustained. Choose one creature you can see within range. The target regains 2d6 + your Intelligence modifier hit points.
In addition, you may end one of the following conditions affecting the target: grappled, prone, or slowed.
Repeated Stitching. If you cast this spell on the same creature a second time before you finish a long rest, that casting restores only half as many hit points.

sheet.description: One creature you can see regains 2d6 + Intelligence modifier hit points; you may end grappled, prone, or slowed. If cast on the same creature a second time before your next long rest, that casting restores only half as many hit points.

description.p: You have learned arcane stitch. It does not count against your number of artificer spells prepared or spells known. You cast it using your normal artificer spell slots.

sheet.description: You know arcane stitch. It does not count against your prepared or known spells; cast it using your artificer spell slots. Track repeated targets manually: a second casting on the same creature before your next long rest heals only half.

description.p: Enable this option to add the granted arcane stitch spell to this character. The spell is on the artificer and wizard spell lists, but this grant adds it as an artificer spell for this character without using a prepared-spell or known-spell choice.

setters.set: You gain arcane stitch as an artificer spell; it does not count against your prepared or known spells.
